mode_profiles.plain_raw: single model call over raw original paragraphs and raw HTML tables only, without record metadata
mode_profiles.plain_chunked: single model call over a raw source.json file for the selected original record, containing only paragraphs and raw HTML tables
mode_profiles.harness_plain_raw: single model call over full raw original_md_csv main.md and all raw CSV files, without evaluator metadata
mode_profiles.tools_plain_raw: multi-step JSON tool loop over full raw original_md_csv main.md, raw CSV rows, ranked search, file listing, and calculator without a source index

list_files.notes: List raw file paths in the corpus. This is a directory listing only, not a source index.

args.path: main.md or a CSV filename found in raw text

read_file.notes: Read raw source file text or a line window.

args.path: optional main.md or discovered CSV filename

search_text.notes: Rank-search raw source lines by exact match or overlapping content terms and return file paths plus context.

args.path: CSV filename found in raw text

table.notes: Read a raw CSV row window. Row coordinates are zero-based.

find_rows.notes: Find raw CSV rows whose cells contain a substring.

args.values: numbers or numeric strings used with operation

calculator.notes: Calculate with source numbers after they have been observed. Supports +, -, *, /, **, and parentheses.

shared_evaluator.note: Evaluator labels are used only after provider answers are returned.
